title: TaCZ: Better Repair Screen
description: Improves the TaCZ: Durability mod`s repair screen. (REQUIRES TaCZ: DURABILITY)
body:
## Updated to the newest version of TacZ: Durability!

The repair GUI in the TaCZ:Durability mod is a little lacking, so I improved it!

This resource pack adds the icons for items used to repair weapons, making it easier to determine where to place items in the Repair Bench.

**Get TaCZ:Durability [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-durability)**
